name: research-and-write
description: Research a topic, draft content based on findings, then review for quality. Demonstrates sequential dependency chains, template interpolation, and error recovery with fallback.

topic.description: The topic to research and write about.

steps.label: Research topic
steps.prompt:
Research the following topic thoroughly: {{input.topic}}

Gather key facts, recent developments, and relevant context. Output a structured research brief with sections: Overview, Key Points, Sources, and Open Questions.

steps.label: Lightweight research fallback
steps.prompt:
Provide a brief overview of: {{input.topic}}

Focus on the most essential facts and context. Keep it concise — this is a fallback for when deep research fails.

steps.label: Draft content
Review and polish
